repair_history.diagnosis: left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type 'Types::speed.speed_impl' and 'real', but must be of the same type: AGREE equality comparison between incompatible types: speed_impl and real -> Change 'Actual' to 'Actual_previous' on the left side of the equality to match the right side type

Target (port spec) points to Types  speed.speed_impl (entity reference), which is not of an adequate kind: AGREE annex references port type 'Types::speed.speed_impl' which is not a valid AADL type for AGREE expressions -> Replace 'Actual_previous' declaration with 'Actual_previous: Types::speed.speed_impl' to match port type
Actual (port spec) points to Types  speed.speed_impl (entity reference), which is not of an adequate kind: AGREE guarantee references port type 'Types::speed.speed_impl' which is not a valid AADL type for AGREE expressions -> Rewrite guarantee to use 'Actual' directly instead of comparing 'Actual_previous' to 'Actual_previous + 0.1 * Actuator_Input'

left and right sides of binary expression '+' are of type 'Types::speed.speed_impl' and 'real', but must be of the same type: AGREE cannot perform arithmetic on opaque types; 'Actual' and 'Actual_previous' are of type 'Types::speed.speed_impl' -> Change 'Actual' and 'Actual_previous' to be of type 'Base_Types::Float' to enable arithmetic operations

left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type 'Types::speed.speed_impl' and 'real', but must be of the same type: Type mismatch in equality expression: Actual is of type Types::speed.speed_impl, Actual_previous is of type Base_Types::Float -> Change Actual_previous declaration to Types::speed.speed_impl and adjust the guarantee to use a valid type-compatible expression or remove the equation if not needed

left and right sides of binary expression '+' are of type 'Types::speed.speed_impl' and 'real', but must be of the same type: AGREE equation attempts arithmetic on incompatible types: speed_impl and real -> Change Actual_previous declaration to Base_Types::Float and adjust the equation to use compatible types
